attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
SOXOH.HEADER_ID ,
SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME, 
CASE WHEN 
SOXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'N'  ELSE 'Y' END AS NO_TOUCH_FLAG, 
SOXOH.QUOTE_NUMBER ,
SOXOH.CREATED_BY ,
SOXOH.CREATION_DATE, 
SOXOH.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
SOXOH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE 
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORD_HDR_NTFLG SOXOH
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
$$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG SOXEL
ON 
SOXOH.XXCCP_HEADER_ID=SOXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID AND
SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME = SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME 
INNER JOIN 
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
ON
SOXOH.HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
AND
CASE WHEN SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' ELSE 'BV' END = SSO.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN 
SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOT
ON 
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY	
WHERE 
SOXOH.OPERATION='CREATE' 
AND
SOXEL.OPERATION_CODE = 'CREATE'
AND
	NSOT.CISCO_BOOKED_RESULT_CD = 'BOOKED'
AND
	SOXEL.FOR_CSE_INTEGRATION = 'Y'
AND 
	SOXEL.ERROR_STATUS = 'CSE_COMPLETED'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SOXOH.HEADER_ID,SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SOXEL.ERROR_DATE DESC)=1

SELECT 
SOXOH.XXCCP_HEADER_ID, 
SOXOH.QUOTE_NUMBER, 
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SOXOH.HEADER_ID, 
SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME, 
SOXOH.STATUS, 
SOXOH.SUB_STATUS, 
SOXOH.CREATED_BY, 
SOXOH.CREATION_DATE, 
SOXOH.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
SOXOH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
SOXOH.OPERATION 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORD_HDR_NTFLG  SOXOH
INNER JOIN 
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
ON
SOXOH.HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
AND
CASE WHEN SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' ELSE 'BV' END = SSO.SS_CODE
WHERE 
SOXOH.OPERATION = 'CREATE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SOXOH.HEADER_ID,SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SOXOH.CREATE_DATETIME DESC)  =1

SELECT 
EXNT.XXCCP_HEADER_ID               
,EXNT.QUOTE_NUMBER                  
,EXNT.HEADER_ID                     
,EXNT.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,EXNT.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,EXNT.STATUS                        
,EXNT.SUB_STATUS                    
,EXNT.ORDER_NUMBER                  
,EXNT.ORDER_SOURCE_ID               
,EXNT.CS_CASE_NUMBER                
,EXNT.CS_REQUEST_ID                 
,EXNT.CONTEXT                       
,EXNT.ORDERED_DATE                  
,EXNT.ORDER_TYPE_ID                 
,EXNT.CREATED_BY                    
,EXNT.CREATION_DATE                 
,EXNT.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,EXNT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,EXNT.OPERATION                     
,EXNT.BATCH_ID                      
,EXNT.CREATE_DATETIME               
,EXNT.ACTION_CODE                   
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORD_HDR_NTFLG EXNT
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORD_HDR_NTFLG  SOXOH
WHERE 
EXNT.XXCCP_HEADER_ID = SOXOH.XXCCP_HEADER_ID AND
EXNT.GLOBAL_NAME = SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT 
SOXOH.XXCCP_HEADER_ID 
,SOXOH.QUOTE_NUMBER 
,SOXOH.HEADER_ID 
,SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME 
,SOXOH.GES_UPDATE_DATE 
,SOXOH.STATUS 
,SOXOH.SUB_STATUS 
,SOXOH.ORDER_NUMBER 
,SOXOH.ORDER_SOURCE_ID 
,SOXOH.CS_CASE_NUMBER 
,SOXOH.CS_REQUEST_ID 
,SOXOH.CONTEXT 
,SOXOH.ORDERED_DATE 
,SOXOH.ORDER_TYPE_ID 
,SOXOH.CREATED_BY 
,SOXOH.CREATION_DATE 
,SOXOH.LAST_UPDATED_BY 
,SOXOH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE 
,SOXOH.OPERATION 
,SOXOH.BATCH_ID 
,SOXOH.CREATE_DATETIME 
,SOXOH.ACTION_CODE 
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORD_HDR_NTFLG SOXOH
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
WHERE
SOXOH.HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
AND
CASE WHEN SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' ELSE 'BV' END = SSO.SS_CODE
AND SOXOH.OPERATION = 'CREATE'
)
